input: Plan an event storming workshop for a new e-commerce platform with 8 participants.
expected_behavior: Selects Event Storming technique based on domain exploration goal. Designs time-boxed agenda with diverge-converge rhythm, silent-before-spoken rule. Includes domain events, commands, aggregates, bounded contexts. Participant count within ideal 5-8 range.

input: Facilitate a remote impact mapping session for a team of 12 across 3 time zones.
expected_behavior: Adapts for remote format (Miro/FigJam), limits sessions to 2-3 hours, plans breakout rooms for the 12-person group, avoids remote anti-patterns (death by screen-share, phantom consensus). Addresses time zone scheduling.

input: Design a 3-day compressed design sprint for validating a new mobile banking feature.
expected_behavior: Produces compressed 3-day sprint format covering understand, sketch, decide, prototype, test. Includes 5 user interview slots on Day 3. Assigns roles. Accounts for prototype creation time.

input: Run a user story mapping session to plan MVP release for a SaaS project.
expected_behavior: Produces backbone construction, walking skeleton identification, vertical slicing, horizontal release lines, MVP as thinnest slice. Includes dependency flagging between stories.

input: Plan a workshop where two VPs have opposing views on product direction and the team has workshop fatigue.
expected_behavior: Uses structured techniques to reduce power dynamics (silent brainstorming, anonymous voting). Keeps session shorter and action-oriented. Plans to demonstrate follow-through from prior workshops. Facilitator remains neutral.
